era_context: Same as previous years in this batch. Neo-Assyrian Empire, Greek Archaic period, Western Zhou, Maya Classic period.
geographic_coverage_gaps: Essentially all regions except the Near East, and even there documentation is sparse for this specific year
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified; no events are documented for this year.
historiographic_note: 903 BCE is not documented in surviving sources. The historical record for the early 1st millennium BCE is episodic rather than continuous; major events (reigns, wars, religious transformations) are recorded, but most individual years leave no trace in the surviving documentation.
